title: lycopodium longifolium
intro: Lycopodium longifolium, also known as Spiny Club Moss, is a species of club moss in the genus Lycopodium. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lycopodium longifolium include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and to soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Lycopodium longifolium can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and capsules, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
